text: Nein, ich darf eigentlich documentaries. Jared ... Ich habe in Formecje heitet, und deswegen wollt würde die Bürgermeister Torah patriarchalieren. Die Prof. solution, if I may, die Praische Gospel bana克 Lache in einem Schluss war ein konstruktive Grund, in dem wir nach Zuhause verholen können, an всю acercaer Zeit sein ist. So, wir denke, die Lösung bekommt nicht, wer das der Grund Beth niet daz UN wünschte, By consensus now with your leadership. Secondly, I would like to support the proposal for a vote. The reason for that is that this session was established in order to take a decision on a doctrine of the net zero framework. We should take that decision, that's what we do in this organisation. We take decisions with good preparation. und wir læst werden unsere An奇penthese nationalism setzen. Wir wünschten das Thema wilderness und werden auch unser Klownbank veroffsockt. Danke. Danke. Das ist zu vere elementar. Der United States-Isla Copy hell bei du dropet. Danke. Danke sehr. So, first of all, Mr. Secretary General, we would like to commend you for your efforts. We are doing a great work altogether as a guardian of this organization and we thank you for that and we recognize that publicly. Also, Mr. Chair, let me accept your apologies by also commenting you on the work you've been doing. Not many would be able to do what you do as well as you do in this position. So thank you, as well. A point of clarification, when I said the meeting was not happening in this room, I maybe should have said that it's not necessarily happening in this building. So I just wanted that to be clarified. We will always strive for unity as Brazil, even when there is momentaneous disagreement. But as the UK said, we are supposed to make decisions sometimes and this is one of those times. The situation we understand that perhaps making a decision will be us to a path in which we can find unity further down the road. That's our sincere hope. For this reason, we respectfully would like to disagree with the proposal made by Singapore just now of deferring the meeting and we would like to ask you about what would be the procedures to start the vote as requested by Brazil. Thank you very much, sir. Let me take on another guy to you, please.

Ich habe in Formecje heitet, und deswegen wollt würde die Bürgermeister Torah patriarchalieren.
Die Prof. solution, if I may,
die Praische Gospel bana克 Lache in einem Schluss

By consensus now with your leadership.
Secondly, I would like to support the proposal for a vote.
The reason for that is that this session was established in order to take a decision
on a doctrine of the net zero framework.
We should take that decision, that's what we do in this organisation.
We take decisions with good preparation.

So, first of all, Mr. Secretary General, we would like to commend you for your efforts.
We are doing a great work altogether as a guardian of this organization and we thank
you for that and we recognize that publicly.
Also, Mr. Chair, let me accept your apologies by also commenting you on the work you've
been doing.
Not many would be able to do what you do as well as you do in this position.
So thank you, as well.
A point of clarification, when I said the meeting was not happening in this room, I
maybe should have said that it's not necessarily happening in this building.
So I just wanted that to be clarified.
We will always strive for unity as Brazil, even when there is momentaneous disagreement.
But as the UK said, we are supposed to make decisions sometimes and this is one of those times.
The situation we understand that perhaps making a decision will be us to a path in which
we can find unity further down the road.
That's our sincere hope.
For this reason, we respectfully would like to disagree with the proposal made by Singapore
just now of deferring the meeting and we would like to ask you about what would be the
procedures to start the vote as requested by Brazil.
Thank you very much, sir.
Let me take on another guy to you, please.
